title: descurainia pinnata var. filipes
intro: Descurainia pinnata var. filipes, also known as wild cabbage or American peppergrass, is a biennial herb native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Descurainia pinnata var. filipes include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal benefits, with some traditional uses also involving the leaves being added to salads or used as a cooking green.
